blocks.task: EXPLORE: Test monkey-lang VM promise-like async pattern
blocks.summary: Promise-like pattern does NOT work due to closure scoping limitation: when resolve(v) is called inside a nested function, val=v creates a new local binding rather than mutating the enclosing scope. Direct closure mutation works, but passing a closure through a function parameter loses the reference. Simulated pattern needs a mutable container (array/hash) workaround.
blocks.details: Promise-like pattern does NOT work due to closure scoping limitation: when resolve(v) is called inside a nested function, val=v creates a new local binding rather than mutating the enclosing scope. Direct closure mutation works, but passing a closure through a function parameter loses the reference. Simulated pattern needs a mutable container (array/hash) workaround.

blocks.task: Explore SMT solver and simplex LP solver
blocks.summary: SMT solver: EUF (Equality with Uninterpreted Functions) detects congruence closure conflicts. f(a)=x,f(b)=y,a=b,x≠y → conflict. Bounds solver: checks interval consistency. Simplex LP: feasibility checking with linear constraints, supports backtracking. x+y≤10,x≥6,y≥6 → infeasible. CDCL SAT + theory solvers = full SMT architecture.

queue.goal: HenryDB: close remaining fuzzer gap - type affinity edge cases
queue.summary: HenryDB type affinity audit: found 6 edge cases — boolean/int coercion (1=1.0→true not 1), cross-type comparisons failing (1="1"→null), typeof("str")→null, CAST string→int→null. Filled 3 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: HenryDB: fix boolean/integer coercion (comparisons should return 1/0 not true/false)
queue.summary: Fixed boolean/integer coercion across 3 code paths: expression-evaluator (3 comparison sites), _evalValue bridge (true/false→1/0), volcano-planner comparators. All comparisons now return 1/0/NULL per SQLite spec. All tests pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: fix cross-type comparisons (numeric affinity coercion for = > < operators)
queue.summary: Fixed cross-type comparisons: extended numeric affinity coercion from EQ/NE to all comparison operators (LT/GT/LE/GE). Applied to both expression-evaluator and volcano-planner. 10>'9' now correctly returns 1. 94 fuzzer tests pass.

queue.task: HenryDB: fix typeof() for string literals and CAST() for string→integer
queue.summary: typeof() and CAST() already work correctly. The earlier test failures were due to using double quotes (SQL identifiers) instead of single quotes (string literals). No code changes needed.
